title: lastrea diversisora
intro: Lastrea diversisora, also known as the fern plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea diversisora include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Lastrea diversisora typically involve drying the plant's fronds and using them to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
